name: gamma4-local-harness
description: Local-first coding harness running Gemma 4 (E4B) via Ollama

scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @local-harness/approval-workflow && npm run build --workspace @local-harness/model-adapter && npm run build --workspace @local-harness/planner && npm run build --workspace @local-harness/prompt-recipes && npm run build --workspace @local-harness/repo-indexer && npm run build --workspace @local-harness/session-store && npm run build --workspace @local-harness/skills && npm run build --workspace @local-harness/tool-runtime && npm run build --workspace @local-harness/trace-bus && npm run build --workspace @local-harness/workspace-policy && npm run build --workspace @local-harness/doctor && npm run build --workspace @local-harness/core
scripts.build:apps: npm run build --workspace @local-harness/api && npm run build --workspace @local-harness/cli && npm run build --workspace web
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.test: npm run build && tsx tests/unit/core.test.ts && tsx tests/integration/workflow.test.ts && tsx tests/e2e/cli.test.ts && tsx tests/e2e/api.test.ts
